title: Ocean Animal Plush Pet Play Pals with Voice Fun for Cats & Dogs – Shark, Crab, Whale Variety(Hammerhead shark)
features: Adorable ocean pals collection: Features shark, crab, and whale designs, each with soft plush material for pets to enjoy.
Voice sounds spark excitement: Built-in voice feature makes engaging noises to grab your pet's attention and keep them amused.
Handles rough play easily: Constructed with tough materials to stand up to chewing, batting, and roughhousing from both cats and dogs.
Promotes independent fun: Pets can play solo for hours, helping reduce boredom and encourage activity without constant supervision.
Interactive and engaging: Perfect for shared play sessions, these pals respond to touch or movement, making every interaction lively and fun."
description: Give your furry friend a soft and practical companion! This large plush white duck dog toy is not only an interactive partner for your dog to play to its heart's content, but also a comfortable pillow to guard its peaceful sleep, solving the dual needs of your dog's play and rest in one stop.​ In terms of design, the cute white duck shape with realistic goose patterns breaks the monotony of traditional pet toys. The vivid appearance can instantly catch your dog's eyes, making it take the initiative to engage in play. Whether it's chasing, carrying (lightly) or snuggling, your dog will enjoy it. In terms of material, we carefully select skin-friendly plush fabric, which feels as soft as a cloud. It won't cause skin discomfort when the dog touches it. Even if the dog lies on it to sleep for a long time, it can maintain a soft and comfortable state, giving the dog the warmth of being hugged.​ However, it is important to note that this toy is positioned as a ""companion type"" rather than a ""tear-resistant type"". It is not tear-resistant, so please never let your dog chew it alone for a long time to avoid fabric damage and exposed filling. When the dog is using it, the owner must be by its side. On the one hand, you can interact and play with the dog to enhance the bond between you; on the other hand, you can stop the dog's excessive chewing in time to aviod it from swallowing the filling and ensure the dog's safety.​ Whether your dog feels lonely when staying at home alone and needs a ""little partner"" to accompany it, or you want to close the distance with your dog through an interactive toy, or you want to add a soft pillow to your dog's kennel to improve its sleep quality, this plush white duck dog toy can meet your needs. It is an indispensable practical item for pet families, allowing your furry friend to release energy while playing and enjoy a peaceful time while resting!"
